message:
Add shutdown-on-drop for OwnedWriteHalf with opt-out control

- split.rs: Add shutdown_on_drop field to OwnedWriteHalf (default true),
  implement Drop trait to shutdown write direction, add set_shutdown_on_drop()
  method for explicit control; fix reunite() to disable shutdown before drop
  to prevent double-shutdown on successfully reunited streams
- stream.rs: Add test verifying write half shutdown on drop propagates EOF
  to peer, using non-blocking read loop to detect stream closure

This ensures UnixStream split halves properly clean up on drop while
allowing callers to opt-out when reuniting or managing shutdown manually.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
